title: Fox Girl Animated Inventory
description: Adds animated Fox Girl to yours inventory
body:
Animated fox girl inventory GUI 🦊
Replaces the default inventory with a smooth animated interface to make Minecraft feel more alive and атмосферic. Perfect for cozy, anime, and fantasy styled gameplay.

**Required** [Animatica](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatica)/[AnimaticaReforged](https://modrinth.com/mod/animaticareforged)/[Animatica Foxified](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatica-foxified)
